title: PARACITY 2 Cup Glass Measuring Cup, Liquid Measuring Cups with three Scale and V-Shaped Mouth, Glass Coffee Cups with Handle, Glass Beaker for Kitchen or Restaurant 500 ML
description:
About this item
【Three Scales Available】The glass measuring cup has three clear and accurate scales of ounces, milliliters and cups. The 2 cup measuring cup can meet different needs and let you know the amount added in each step.This 2 cup glass measuring cup is perfect for coffee, milk, and any of your favorite beverages. This liquid measuring cups is a great helper for your DIY drinks or food.
【V-Shaped Spout】The liquid measuring cups has a V-shaped nozzle. V-shaped drain spout makes pouring water more convenient and less likely to leak. The liquid measuring cups can pour water smoothly without making the table dirty. The glass beaker is a good helper for you to make coffee.
【Heat Resistant Thick Borosilicate Glass】The 2 cup glass measuring cup is made of borosilicate glass, which has a stronger texture and more aesthetic appeal. The liquid measuring cups does not contain lead or chromium and can be in direct contact with food. Borosilicate glass enables glass beaker to withstand sudden temperature differences of 20°C-150°C.
【Lightweight Easy-to-Use Glass Handle】This glass measuring cup adopts borosilicate glass handle, ergonomically designed, easy to operate and heat-resistant. The handle made of the same material as the cup body can be naturally connected to the cup, is not easy to break, and is very light. Whether it's fresh coffee from a French press or freshly whipped milk, your hands won't burn.
【Easy to Clean】The glass measuring cup features a wide mouth design, allowing you to reach directly into the 2 cup measuring cups and clean it by hand. All parts of the liquid measuring cups are dishwasher safe, making drinking coffee a breeze.
reviews_5s:
Sturdy, useful, pretty, strong. Works! I make my coffee into it & then pour over ice in my travel cup. Then rinse & repeat the next day. Great!I absolutely love this measuring cup, it pours so nice and no more drips on my counter like I had with my other measuring cups. Plus this looks and feels really nice.I use it to measure water for instant coffee.I bought this for frothing milk. Looks fragile but is holding up perfectly. I microwave milk in it then froth and serve. Actually looks cute on the table.I use this to mix my better than bullion 1 or two cups as needed and can heat it in the microwave to make sure the bullion dissolves.I bought this to heat up milk for my coffee. Of course, I use a microwave; the handle does not get hot so it is easy to handle.Use it to boil water in the microwave, I like the light weight as compared to a normal type measuring cup.
Easy to read graduations.I purchased this measuring cup to place under my Keurig. I was getting so much coffee splash all over my machine because my coffee cups are short. This has prevented any and all splashing. I simply pour into my coffee cup and sip away! No mess.Great to heat my tea water before I put it in my to go cup.Just what we need.
reviews_1s:
The unit measuring is gone already, I've only had this for 6mos and it's been gone from the beaker for 3 mos. Avoid unless you don't need that info.Markings coming off after a few months. AvoidUsed once placed on top rack in dishwasher, hole in bottom.I purchased one on 1/14 and one on 2/8. The first one broke before I bought the second and the second broke today. I’ve had that one a bit over 2 months. They aren’t sturdy at all. They are super cute but too much breakage for me to try it a 3rd time. I’ll take the hint and move on.4/8/24 UPDATE: I originally had given this product a decent review, but was a little concerned about the product weight and thin glass. Well... I was right. The cup developed a crack on the bottom and then broke altogether. Not worth it as it only lasted a few months. I can't give stars to a product designed for use kitchen that just won't last. Stick to Pyrex.

ORIGINAL REVIEW: You can never have too many measuring cups, but having those that be used in the microwave are even more valuable. This is a nice cup, although it does remind me more of a scientific beaker than a measuring cup. It is truly a "cup" shape and much lighter in thickness and weight than I thought (think of a drinking glass). So one star down for that as I think it is going to be less durable than the Anchor or Pyrex style cups. Still, very handy with easy to read graduations and pours liquids well with the V-lip top. Just be aware it isn't going to likely survive being banged around as well as others.
